CustomField.formula: LPAD(TEXT(MONTH(Event_Date__c)), 2, "0") & "/" & LPAD(TEXT(DAY(Event_Date__c)), 2, "0") & "/" & TEXT(YEAR(Event_Date__c)) & " " & IF(AND(TEXT(Event__r.nd_Home_Away__c) = "Away", LEFT(Event__r.nd_Opponent__c, 1) <> "@"), "@", "") & Event__r.nd_Opponent__c
CustomField.label: Event & Date
